_doc: Per-prop transform offsets applied at attach time. Keys are 'Category/filename.fbx' (exact) or 'Category/*' (category-wide default). Exact matches override wildcards. Rotations are in DEGREES (XYZ Euler). Position is in world units. Scale can be a number or [x,y,z]. This file is NOT touched by build_props_manifest.py — edit it freely.
